subcodes.first_line: O ye who are related to that enraptured and soaring handmaiden, that brilliant lady, that cherished bondmaid of God, who in the days of her life chanted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین ورقه منجذبه طائره خانم باهره آن کنیز عزیز الهی در مدت حیات ترتیل
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
